<!-- Clear description of the feature -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits? -->

<!-- How should this feature work? -->

## Example Use Case
<!-- Concrete example of how users would benefit -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What needs to be true for this feature to be complete? -->

## Implementation Notes
<!-- Optional: Any technical details or constraints -->

## Related Features
<!-- Links to similar issues or features -->

## Priority
<!-- High / Medium / Low -->

**Checklist:**
- [ ] This doesn't duplicate existing issues
- [ ] Feature aligns with CortexGIS goals
- [ ] I've provided clear use cases
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable
